name: chr6q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 6 q-arm pericentric flank (6q11.1-6q11.2), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Alpha-satellite (D6Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline on the q-side.
